name: Median income in Lazio (Rome)
description: Employee earning €35,000 in Lazio region (includes Rome). Includes employment tax credit and cuneo fiscale deduction. Verified using verify_italy_tax.py script implementing official formulas.

sources.description: Employment tax credit formula from Art. 13, TUIR
Verified using verify_italy_tax.py (independent Python implementation of official formulas)
